text: 32. NOTICES: Any notice required or permitted to be given hereunder, by one party to the other party shall be in writing and the same shall be given and shall be deemed to have been served and given if delivered in person to the address set forth on page 1 of the  Subcontract,  or  placed  in  the  United  States  Mail,  postage  prepaid,  registered  or  certified,  with  return  receipt  requested, addressed to the party at the address set forth on page 1 of the Subcontract.
